steps.title: Check current spire deployment
steps.description:
Verify your spire version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n spire -l app.kubernetes.io/name=spire
helm list -n spire 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working spire installation.

steps.title: Review spire configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant spire configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n spire -l app.kubernetes.io/name=spire
kubectl get configmap -n spire -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=spire
```
**Background:**
SPIRE implements the concept of ‚Äúadmin‚ÄĚ workloads. A workload presenting an admin SVID is able to act broadly across the entire registration API.

steps.title: Apply the fix for [RFC] Registrations RBAC
steps.description:
This PR adds a field to the middleware `Preprocess` function allowing passing of the request object for Unary gRPC calls. This will allow future enhancement to make more granular actions for `Preprocess` functions, i.e. for authorization to have finer grained policies (#1975) based on the body of
```yaml
Actor‚Äč ‚Äč:‚Äč ‚ÄčRole, 
Role‚Äč ‚Äč:‚Äč ‚Äč[{
              Actions: ‚Äč[], 
              Resources: ‚Äč[], 
              Namespaces: ‚Äč[],
‚Äč         }, 
         {
              Actions: ‚Äč[], 
              Resources: ‚Äč[], 
              Namespaces: ‚Äč[],
‚Äč         }, 
‚Äč}]
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n spire -l app.kubernetes.io/name=spire
kubectl get events -n spire --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "[RFC] Registrations RBAC" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
This PR adds a field to the middleware `Preprocess` function allowing passing of the request object for Unary gRPC calls. This will allow future enhancement to make more granular actions for `Preprocess` functions, i.e. for authorization to have finer grained policies (#1975) based on the body of the request.

Add the `req interface{}` field for `middleware.Preprocess`.
codeSnippets:
Actor‚Äč ‚Äč:‚Äč ‚ÄčRole, 
Role‚Äč ‚Äč:‚Äč ‚Äč[{
              Actions: ‚Äč[], 
              Resources: ‚Äč[], 
              Namespaces: ‚Äč[],
‚Äč         }, 
         {
              Actions: ‚Äč[], 
              Resources: ‚Äč[], 
              Namespaces: ‚Äč[],
‚Äč         }, 
‚Äč}]

input := policy.Input{
		Caller:     spiffeID,
		FullMethod: fullMethod,
		Req:        req,
		Admin:      isAdmin,
		Local:      isLocal,
		Downstream: isDownstream,
		Agent:      isAgentCaller,
	}

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with spire installed or the issue environment reproducible.
